t.asad: Nay - who is it that responds to the distressed when he calls out to Him, and who removes the ill [that caused the distress], and has made you inherit the earth? Could there be any divine power besides God? How seldom do you keep this in mind
t.yusuf-ali: Or, Who listens to the (soul) distressed when it calls on Him, and Who relieves its suffering, and makes you (mankind) inheritors of the earth? (Can there be another) god besides Allah? Little it is that ye heed
t.pickthall: Is not He (best) Who answereth the wronged one when he crieth unto Him and removeth the evil, and hath made you viceroys of the earth? Is there any Allah beside Allah? Little do they reflect
t.arberry: He who answers the constrained, when he calls unto Him, and removes the evil and appoints you to be successors in the earth. Is there a god with God? Little indeed do you remember
t.hilali-khan: Is not He (better than your gods) Who responds to the distressed one, when he calls Him, and Who removes the evil, and makes you inheritors of the earth, generations after generations. Is there any ilah (god) with Allah? Little is that you remember
t.itani: Or, who answers the one in need when he prays to Him, and relieves adversity, and makes you successors on earth? Is there another god with God? How hardly you pay attention.
t.mubarakpuri: Is not He Who responds to the distressed one, when he calls on Him, and Who removes the evil, and makes you inheritors of the earth, generations after generations Is there any god with Allah Little is that you remember!
t.qarib: Is He [not best] Who responds to the desperate when he calls upon Him, and Who removes his distress and makes you successors on earth? Is there a god with God? Little do you remember
t.wahiduddin: Who responds to the oppressed when he calls out to Him, and relieves his suffering and who will make you inheritors of the earth? Then, is there a god besides God? How little you pay heed
t.shakir: Or, Who answers the distressed one when he calls upon Him and removes the evil, and He will make you successors in the earth. Is there a god with Allah? Little is it that you mind
t.haleem: Who is it that answers the distressed when they call upon Him? Who removes their suffering? Who makes you successors in the earth? Is it another god beside God? Little notice you take
t.maariful: Or the One who responds to a helpless person when He prays to Him and removes distress, and who makes you vicegerents of the earth? Is there any god along with Allah? No, but little you heed to advice
t.khattab: Or ˹ask them,˺ “Who responds to the distressed when they cry to Him, relieving ˹their˺ affliction, and ˹Who˺ makes you successors in the earth? Is it another god besides Allah? Yet you are hardly mindful!”
t.ghali: Is not He (Most Charitable) Who answers the constrained person when he invokes Him, and lifts off odious (happenings) and makes you successors of the earth? Is there a god with Allah? Little is that of which you are mindful
t.irving: Who answers the distressed man when he appeals to Him, and removes evil, and makes you overlords on earth? Is there any deity alongside God? How seldom do you reflect [on this]
t.iwq: Is He not best who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Little do you remember

t_id.kemenag: Atau siapakah yang memperkenankan (doa) orang yang dalam kesulitan apabila ia berdoa kepada-Nya, dan yang menghilangkan kesusahan dan yang menjadikan kamu (manusia) sebagai khalifah di bumi? Apakah disamping Allah ada tuhan (yang lain)? Amat sedikitlah kamu mengingati(Nya).
t_id.sabiq: Tanyakan pula kepada mereka, wahai Muahammad, "Siapakah yang mengabulkan permohonan orang yang berdoa dalam keadaan kritis, dalam kesulitan luar biasa, lalu berlari mencari perlindungan dengan merendahkan diri dan khusyuk? Siapakah pula yang menolong manusia dari keburukan yang menimpanya? Siapakah yang mengangkat kalian sebagai khalifah di muka bumi sebagai pengganti orang-orang terdahulu? Tidak ada tuhan lain yang menyertai Allah sebagai pemberi karunia dan nikmat-nikmat itu. Akan tetapi kalian, wahai orang-orang kafir, sedikit sekali mengambil pelajaran."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Atau siapakah yang memperkenankan doa orang yang dalam kesulitan) orang yang sengsara kemudian tertimpa kemudaratan (apabila ia berdoa kepada-Nya, dan yang menghilangkan kesusahan) dari dirinya dan dari diri orang selainnya (dan yang menjadikan kalian sebagai khalifah di bumi) Idhafah dalam lafal Khulafa-al Ardhi mengandung makna Fi. Maksudnya. setiap generasi menjadi pengganti generasi sebelumnya. (Apakah di samping Allah ada tuhan yang lain? Amat sedikitlah kalian mengingati-Nya) mengambil pelajaran dari hal ini. Lafal Tadzakkaruna dapat pula dibaca Yadzdzakkaruna; kemudian huruf Ta di-idgham-kan kepada huruf Dzal. Dan huruf Ma di sini untuk menunjukkan makna sedikit sekali. bintang sebagai pemandunya di waktu tengah malam, dan, dengan tanda-tanda yang ada di daratan di waktu siang hari
t_id.iwq: Atau siapakah yang memperkenankan (doa) orang yang dalam kesulitan apabila ia berdoa kepada-Nya, dan yang menghilangkan kesusahan dan yang menjadikan kamu (manusia) sebagai khalifah di bumi? Apakah disamping Allah ada tuhan (yang lain)? Amat sedikitlah kamu mengingati(Nya).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أَمَّن يجيب المضطر» المكروب الذي مسه الضر «إذا دعاه ويكشف السوء» عنه وعن غيره «ويجعلكم خلفاء الأرض» الإضافة بمعنى في، أي يخلف كل قرن القرن الذي قبله: «أَإِله مع الله قليلاً ما تذكَّرون» تتعظون بالفوقانية والتحتانية وفيه إدغام التاء في الذال وما زائدة لتقليل القليل
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكۡشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ (وَيَكْشِفُ السُّوءَ: يُزِيلُ المَكْرُوهَ, خُلَفَاءَ الْأَرْضِ: تَخْلُفُونَ مَنْ سَبَقَكُمْ فِي الأَرْضِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Atau siapakah yang memperkenankan doa orang yang dalam kesulitan) orang yang sengsara kemudian tertimpa kemudaratan (apabila ia berdoa kepada-Nya, dan yang menghilangkan kesusahan) dari dirinya dan dari diri orang selainnya (dan yang menjadikan kalian sebagai khalifah di bumi) Idhafah dalam lafal Khulafa-al Ardhi mengandung makna Fi. Maksudnya. setiap generasi menjadi pengganti generasi sebelumnya. (Apakah di samping Allah ada tuhan yang lain? Amat sedikitlah kalian mengingati-Nya) mengambil pelajaran dari hal ini. Lafal Tadzakkaruna dapat pula dibaca Yadzdzakkaruna; kemudian huruf Ta di-idgham-kan kepada huruf Dzal. Dan huruf Ma di sini untuk menunjukkan makna sedikit sekali. bintang sebagai pemandunya di waktu tengah malam, dan, dengan tanda-tanda yang ada di daratan di waktu siang hari

ar: أَمَّن یَهۡدِیكُمۡ فِی ظُلُمَـٰتِ ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن یُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّیَـٰحَ بُشۡرَۢا بَیۡنَ یَدَیۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۤۗ أَءِلَـٰهࣱ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ تَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا یُشۡرِكُونَ
ar_simple: أَمَّنْ يَهْدِيكُمْ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ الْبَرِّ وَالْبَحْرِ وَمَنْ يُرْسِلُ الرِّيَاحَ بُشْرًا بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ ۗ أَإِلَٰهٌ مَعَ اللَّهِ ۚ تَعَالَى اللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
transliteration: amman yahdīkum fī ẓulumāti l-bari wal-baḥri waman yur'silu l-riyāḥa bush'ran bayna yaday raḥmatihi a-ilāhun maʿa l-lahi taʿālā l-lahu ʿammā yush'rikūna

t.sahih-int: Is He [not best] who guides you through the darknesses of the land and sea and who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy? Is there a deity with Allah? High is Allah above whatever they associate with Him
t.asad: Nay - who is it that guides you in the midst of the deep darkness of land and sea, and sends forth the winds as a glad tiding of His coming grace? Could there be any divine power besides God? Sublimely exalted is God above anything to which men may ascribe a share in His divinity
t.yusuf-ali: Or, Who guides you through the depths of darkness on land and sea, and Who sends the winds as heralds of glad tidings, going before His Mercy? (Can there be another) god besides Allah?- High is Allah above what they associate with Him
t.pickthall: Is not He (best) Who guideth you in the darkness of the land and the sea, He Who sendeth the winds as heralds of His mercy? Is there any Allah beside Allah? High Exalted be Allah from all that they ascribe as partner (unto Him)
t.arberry: He who guides you in the shadows of the land and the sea and looses the winds, bearing good tidings before His mercy. Is there a god with God? High exalted be God, above that which they associate
t.hilali-khan: Is not He (better than your gods) Who guides you in the darkness of the land and the sea, and Who sends the winds as heralds of glad tidings, going before His Mercy (rain)? Is there any ilah (god) with Allah? High Exalted be Allah above all that they associate as partners (to Him)
t.itani: Or, who guides you through the darkness of land and sea, and who sends the winds as heralds of His mercy? Is there another god with God? Most exalted is God, above what they associate.
t.mubarakpuri: Is not He Who guides you in the darkness of the land and the sea, and Who sends the winds as heralds of glad tidings, going before His mercy Is there any god with Allah Exalted be Allah above all that they associate as partners!
t.qarib: Is He [not best] Who guides you through the darkness of land and sea and who sends the winds, bringing advance news of His mercy? Is there a god with God? Exalted is God above whatever they associate with Him
t.wahiduddin: Who guides you in the darkness of the land and sea? Who sends the breezes as heralds of His mercy? Then, is there a deity besides God? Exalted is God above what they associate with Him
t.shakir: Or, Who guides you in utter darkness of the land and the sea, and Who sends the winds as good news before His mercy. Is there a god with Allah? Exalted by Allah above what they associate (with Him)
t.haleem: Who is it that guides you through the darkness on land and sea? Who sends the winds as heralds of good news before His mercy? Is it another god beside God? God is far above the partners they put beside him
t.maariful: Or the One who guides you in depths of darkness on land and sea, and who sends the winds bearing good news before His mercy? Is there any god along with Allah? Allah is far higher than the partners they ascribe to Him
t.khattab: Or ˹ask them,˺ “Who guides you in the darkness of the land and sea, and sends the winds ushering in His mercy? Is it another god besides Allah? Exalted is Allah above what they associate ˹with Him˺
t.ghali: Is not He (Most Charitable) Who guides you in the darknesses of the land and the sea and Who sends the winds, bearing good tidings before (Literally: between the two Hands of) His mercy? Is there a god with Allah? Supremely Exalted be Allah above whatever they associate (with Him)
t.irving: Who guides you through darkness on land and at sea, and Who sends out winds as heralds for His mercy? Is there any deity alongside God? Exalted is God over anything they may associate [with Him]
t.iwq: Is He not best who guides you through the darknesses of the land and sea and who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy? Is there a deity with Allah? High is Allah above whatever they associate with Him

t_id.kemenag: Atau siapakah yang memimpin kamu dalam kegelapan di dataran dan lautan dan siapa (pula)kah yang mendatangkan angin sebagai kabar gembira sebelum (kedatangan) rahmat-Nya? Apakah disamping Allah ada tuhan (yang lain)? Maha Tinggi Allah terhadap apa yang mereka persekutukan (dengan-Nya).
t_id.sabiq: Tanyakan pula kepada mereka, wahai Rasul, "Siapakah yang membimbing kalian dalam perjalanan malam yang gelap gulita, di laut dan di darat? Siapakah pula yang mengirim angin pertanda hujan sebagai pembawa rahmat? Adakah tuhan selain Allah yang mampu berbuat demikian? Allah Mahasuci untuk mempunyai sekutu."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Atau siapakah yang memimpin kalian) yakni yang membimbing kalian kepada tujuan-tujuan kalian (dalam kegelapan di daratan dan lautan) dengan bintang-bintang sebagai pemandunya di waktu tengah malam dan dengan tanda-tanda yang ada di daratan di waktu siang hari (dan siapa pulakah yang mendatangkan angin sebagai kabar gembira sebelum kedatangan rahmat-Nya) sebelum hujan tiba (Apakah di samping Allah ada tuhan yang lain? Maha Tinggi Allah terhadap apa yang mereka persekutukan) dengan-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Atau siapakah yang memimpin kamu dalam kegelapan di dataran dan lautan dan siapa (pula)kah yang mendatangkan angin sebagai kabar gembira sebelum (kedatangan) rahmat-Nya? Apakah disamping Allah ada tuhan (yang lain)? Maha Tinggi Allah terhadap apa yang mereka persekutukan (dengan-Nya).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أمَّن يهديكم» يرشدكم إلى مقاصدكم «في ظلمات البر والبحر» بالنجوم ليلاً وبعلامات الأرض نهاراً «ومن يرسل الرياح بُشراً بين يديْ رحمته» قدام المطر «أَإِله مع الله تعالى الله عما يشركون» به غيره
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمۡ فِي ظُلُمَٰتِ ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيَٰحَ بُشۡرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦٓۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ (يَهْدِيكُمْ: يُرْشِدُكُمْ, بُشْرًا: مُبَشِّرَاتٍ بِالمَطَرِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Atau siapakah yang memimpin kalian) yakni yang membimbing kalian kepada tujuan-tujuan kalian (dalam kegelapan di daratan dan lautan) dengan bintang-bintang sebagai pemandunya di waktu tengah malam dan dengan tanda-tanda yang ada di daratan di waktu siang hari (dan siapa pulakah yang mendatangkan angin sebagai kabar gembira sebelum kedatangan rahmat-Nya) sebelum hujan tiba (Apakah di samping Allah ada tuhan yang lain? Maha Tinggi Allah terhadap apa yang mereka persekutukan) dengan-Nya

ar: أَمَّن یَبۡدَؤُا۟ ٱلۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ یُعِیدُهُۥ وَمَن یَرۡزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَاۤءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَءِلَـٰهࣱ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قُلۡ هَاتُوا۟ بُرۡهَـٰنَكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَـٰدِقِینَ
ar_simple: أَمَّنْ يَبْدَأُ الْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُ وَمَنْ يَرْزُقُكُمْ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ ۗ أَإِلَٰهٌ مَعَ اللَّهِ ۚ قُلْ هَاتُوا بُرْهَانَكُمْ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ صَادِقِينَ
transliteration: amman yabda-u l-khalqa thumma yuʿīduhu waman yarzuqukum mina l-samāi wal-arḍi a-ilāhun maʿa l-lahi qul hātū bur'hānakum in kuntum ṣādiqīna

t.sahih-int: Is He [not best] who begins creation and then repeats it and who provides for you from the heaven and earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Say, "Produce your proof, if you should be truthful
t.asad: Nay - who is it that creates [all life] in the first instance, and then brings it forth anew? And who is it that provides you with sustenance out of heaven and earth? Could there be any divine power besides God? Say: “[If you think so,] produce your evidence - if you truly believe in your claim!”
t.yusuf-ali: Or, Who originates creation, then repeats it, and who gives you sustenance from heaven and earth? (Can there be another) god besides Allah? Say, "Bring forth your argument, if ye are telling the truth
t.pickthall: Is not He (best) Who produceth creation, then reproduceth it, and Who provideth for you from the heaven and the earth? Is there any Allah beside Allah? Say: Bring your proof, if ye are truthful
t.arberry: Who originates creation, then brings it back again, and provides you out of heaven and earth. Is there a god with God? Say: 'Produce your proof, if you speak truly
t.hilali-khan: Is not He (better than your so-called gods) Who originates creation, and shall thereafter repeat it, and Who provides for you from heaven and earth? Is there any ilah (god) with Allah? Say, "Bring forth your proofs, if you are truthful
t.itani: Or, who originates the creation and then repeats it, and who gives you livelihood from the sky and the earth? Is there another god with God? Say, “Produce your evidence, if you are truthful.”
t.mubarakpuri: Is not He Who originates creation, and shall thereafter repeat it, and Who provides for you from heaven and earth Is there any god with Allah Say: "Bring forth your proofs, if you are truthful."
t.qarib: Is He [not best] Who begins creation and then repeats it, and Who provides for you from the heaven and the earth? Is there a god with God? Say, "Show me your evidence, if you are truthful
t.wahiduddin: Who originates creation, then regenerates it, and who gives you sustenance from heaven and earth? Then, is there a deity besides God?" Say, "Bring forward your proofs, if you are telling the truth
t.shakir: Or, Who originates the creation, then reproduces it and Who gives you sustenance from the heaven and the earth. Is there a god With Allah? Say: Bring your proof if you are truthful
t.haleem: Who is it that creates life and reproduces it? Who is it that gives you provision from the heavens and earth? Is it another god beside God?’ Say, ‘Show me your evidence then, if what you say is true.’
t.maariful: Or the One who originated creation, then will reproduce it, and who gives you provision from the sky and the earth? Is there any god along with Allah? Say, “Bring your proof if you are true.”
t.khattab: Or ˹ask them,˺ “Who originates the creation then resurrects it, and gives you provisions from the heavens and the earth? Is it another god besides Allah?” Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “Show ˹me˺ your proof, if what you say is true.”
t.ghali: Is not He (Most Charitable) Who begins creation, (and) thereafter He brings it back again, and Who provides you from the heaven and the earth? Is there a god with Allah? Say, "Offer your proof, in case you are sincere
t.irving: Who begins with creation, then performs it all over again? Who provides for you from Heaven and Earth? Is there any deity alongside God? SAY: "Bring on your proof if you have been so truthful
t.iwq: Is He not best who begins creation and then repeats it and who provides for you from the heaven and earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Say, "Produce your proof, if you should be truthful

t_id.kemenag: Atau siapakah yang menciptakan (manusia dari permulaannya), kemudian mengulanginya (lagi), dan siapa (pula) yang memberikan rezeki kepadamu dari langit dan bumi? Apakah disamping Allah ada tuhan (yang lain)?. Katakanlah: "Unjukkanlah bukti kebenaranmu, jika kamu memang orang-orang yang benar".
t_id.sabiq: Tanyakan juga kepada mereka, "Siapakah yang mula-mula menciptakan makhluk kemudian menghidupkannya kembali sesudah fana nanti? Siapakah yang mendatangkan rezeki untuk kalian dari atas langit dan dari dalam bumi? Tak ada yang dapat melakukan pekerjaan semacam itu kecuali Allah." Katakan pula, wahai Muhammad, untuk mencela dan mengingkari perbuatan mereka, "Jika kalian memiliki tuhan selain Allah, tunjukkanlah kepada kami alasan-alasan yang membenarkan hal itu, kalau kalian sungguh- sungguh orang yang jujur dan benar. Kami yakin kalain tidak akan dapat melakukannya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Atau siapakah yang menciptakan manusia dari permulaannya) di dalam rahim, yakni dari air mani (kemudian mengulanginya lagi) menghidupkannya kembali sesudah mati, sekalipun kalian tidak mengakui adanya hari berbangkit itu, karena bukti-bukti yang menunjukkannya telah jelas (dan siapa pula yang memberikan rezeki dari langit) melalui hujan (dan bumi?) melalui tumbuh-tumbuhan. (Apakah di samping Allah ada tuhan yang lain?") maksudnya, tidak ada yang dapat melakukan sedikit pun dari hal-hal yang telah disebutkan tadi melainkan hanya Allah semata, dan tiada Tuhan selain-Nya. (Katakanlah) hai Muhammad!, ("Unjukkanlah bukti kebenaran kalian) argumentasi kalian (jika kalian memang orang-orang yang benar") bahwasanya di samping-Ku ada tuhan lain yang mampu berbuat sesuatu dari hal-hal yang telah disebutkan tadi. Kemudian orang-orang kafir itu bertanya kepada Nabi saw. tentang waktu kiamat, maka turunlah firman-Nya,
t_id.iwq: Atau siapakah yang menciptakan (manusia dari permulaannya), kemudian mengulanginya (lagi), dan siapa (pula) yang memberikan rezeki kepadamu dari langit dan bumi? Apakah disamping Allah ada tuhan (yang lain)?. Katakanlah: "Unjukkanlah bukti kebenaranmu, jika kamu memang orang-orang yang benar".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أمَّن يبدأ الخلق» في الأرحام من نطفة «ثم يعيده» بعد الموت وإن لم تعترفوا بالإعادة لقيام البراهين عليها «ومن يرزقكم من السماء» بالمطر «والأرض» بالنبات «أَإِله مع الله» أي لا يفعل شيئاً مما ذكر إلا الله ولا إله معه «قل» يا محمد «هاتوا برهانكم» حجتكم «إن كنتم صادقين» أن معي إلهاً فعل شيئاً مما ذكر، وسألوه عن وقت قيام الساعة فنزل
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَمَّن يَبۡدَؤُاْ ٱلۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ وَمَن يَرۡزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قُلۡ هَاتُواْ بُرۡهَٰنَكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Atau siapakah yang menciptakan manusia dari permulaannya) di dalam rahim, yakni dari air mani (kemudian mengulanginya lagi) menghidupkannya kembali sesudah mati, sekalipun kalian tidak mengakui adanya hari berbangkit itu, karena bukti-bukti yang menunjukkannya telah jelas (dan siapa pula yang memberikan rezeki dari langit) melalui hujan (dan bumi?) melalui tumbuh-tumbuhan. (Apakah di samping Allah ada tuhan yang lain?") maksudnya, tidak ada yang dapat melakukan sedikit pun dari hal-hal yang telah disebutkan tadi melainkan hanya Allah semata, dan tiada Tuhan selain-Nya. (Katakanlah) hai Muhammad!, ("Unjukkanlah bukti kebenaran kalian) argumentasi kalian (jika kalian memang orang-orang yang benar") bahwasanya di samping-Ku ada tuhan lain yang mampu berbuat sesuatu dari hal-hal yang telah disebutkan tadi. Kemudian orang-orang kafir itu bertanya kepada Nabi saw. tentang waktu kiamat, maka turunlah firman-Nya

ar: قُل لَّا یَعۡلَمُ مَن فِی ٱلسَّمَـٰوَ ٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ ٱلۡغَیۡبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُۚ وَمَا یَشۡعُرُونَ أَیَّانَ یُبۡعَثُونَ
ar_simple: قُلْ لَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ الْغَيْبَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ ۚ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
transliteration: qul lā yaʿlamu man fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi l-ghayba illā l-lahu wamā yashʿurūna ayyāna yub'ʿathūna

t.sahih-int: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allah, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected
t.asad: Say: “None in the heavens or on earth knows the hidden reality [of anything that exists: none knows it] save God.” And neither can they [who are living] perceive when they shall be raised from the dead
t.yusuf-ali: Say: None in the heavens or on earth, except Allah, knows what is hidden: nor can they perceive when they shall be raised up (for Judgment)
t.pickthall: Say (O Muhammad): None in the heavens and the earth knoweth the Unseen save Allah; and they know not when they will be raised (again)
t.arberry: Say: 'None knows the Unseen in the heavens and earth except God. And they are not aware when they shall be raised
t.hilali-khan: Say: "None in the heavens and the earth knows the Ghaib (unseen) except Allah, nor can they perceive when they shall be resurrected
t.itani: Say, “No one in the heavens or on earth knows the future except God; and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected.”
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "None in the heavens and the earth knows the Unseen except Allah, nor can they perceive when they shall be resurrected."
t.qarib: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows what lies beyond our senses except God, and they do not know when they will be resurrected
t.wahiduddin: Say, "No one in the heavens and the earth has knowledge of the unseen except God." They do not know when they will be raised up again
t.shakir: Say: No one in the heavens and the earth knows the unseen but Allah; and they do not know when they shall be raised
t.haleem: Say, ‘No one in the heavens or on earth knows the unseen except God.’ They do not know when they will be raised from the dead
t.maariful: Say, “No one in the heavens and the earth has the knowledge of the Unseen except Allah.” And they do not know when they will be raised again
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “None in the heavens and the earth has knowledge of the unseen except Allah. Nor do they know when they will be resurrected
t.ghali: Say, "None knows the Unseen in the heavens and the earth except Allah." And in no way are they aware whence they will be made to rise again
t.irving: SAY: "No one in Heaven or knows the Unseen except God!" They do not even realize when they will be raised up again
t.iwq: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allah, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Tidak ada seorangpun di langit dan di bumi yang mengetahui perkara yang ghaib, kecuali Allah", dan mereka tidak mengetahui bila mereka akan dibangkitkan.
t_id.sabiq: Katakan pula, wahai Muhammad, "Sungguh, Zat yang Mahaesa dalam penciptaan alam semesta ini adalah Yang mengetahui segala persoalan gaib, yaitu Allah Swt. Tidak ada seorang pun yang tahu kapan manusia akan dibangkitakan dari kubur untuk diperiksa amal perbuatannya lalu diberi balasan."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah!, "Tidak ada seorang pun di langit dan di bumi yang mengetahui) baik dari kalangan para Malaikat maupun manusia (perkara yang gaib) dari mereka (kecuali) hanya (Allah saja) yang mengetahuinya (dan mereka tidak mengetahui) maksudnya orang-orang kafir Mekah sama pula dengan orang-orang selain mereka (bila) kapan waktunya (mereka dibangkitkan hidup kembali.")
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Tidak ada seorangpun di langit dan di bumi yang mengetahui perkara yang ghaib, kecuali Allah", dan mereka tidak mengetahui bila mereka akan dibangkitkan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل لا يعلم من في السماوات والأرض» من الملائكة والناس «الغيب» أي ما غاب عنهم «إلا» لكن «الله» يعلمه «وما يشعرون» أي كفار مكة كغيرهم «أيان» وقت «يبعثون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُل لَّا يَعۡلَمُ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ ٱلۡغَيۡبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُۚ وَمَا يَشۡعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبۡعَثُونَ (وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ: مَا يَعْلَمُونَ, وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ: مَتَى؟)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah!, "Tidak ada seorang pun di langit dan di bumi yang mengetahui) baik dari kalangan para Malaikat maupun manusia (perkara yang gaib) dari mereka (kecuali) hanya (Allah saja) yang mengetahuinya (dan mereka tidak mengetahui) maksudnya orang-orang kafir Mekah sama pula dengan orang-orang selain mereka (bila) kapan waktunya (mereka dibangkitkan hidup kembali)

ar: بَلِ ٱدَّ ٰرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمۡ فِی ٱلۡءَاخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِی شَكࣲّ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُم مِّنۡهَا عَمُونَ
ar_simple: بَلِ ادَّارَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِي الْآخِرَةِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِي شَكٍّ مِنْهَا ۖ بَلْ هُمْ مِنْهَا عَمُونَ
transliteration: bali iddāraka ʿil'muhum fī l-ākhirati bal hum fī shakkin min'hā bal hum min'hā ʿamūna

t.sahih-int: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind
t.asad: nay, their knowledge of the life to come stops short of the truth: nay, they are [often] in doubt as to its reality: nay, they are blind to it
t.yusuf-ali: Still less can their knowledge comprehend the Hereafter: Nay, they are in doubt and uncertainty thereanent; nay, they are blind thereunto
t.pickthall: Nay, but doth their knowledge reach to the Hereafter? Nay, for they are in doubt concerning it. Nay, for they cannot see it
t.arberry: nay, but their knowledge fails as to the Hereafter; nay, they are in doubt of it; nay, they are blind to it
t.hilali-khan: Nay, they have no knowledge of the Hereafter. Nay, they are in doubt about it. Nay, they are blind about it
t.itani: In fact, their knowledge of the Hereafter is confused. In fact, they are in doubt about it. In fact, they are blind to it.
t.mubarakpuri: Nay, their knowledge will perceive that in the Hereafter. Nay, they are in doubt about it. Nay, they are in complete blindness about it.
t.qarib: Rather, their knowledge cannot comprehend the Hereafter. They are in doubt about it; they are in fact blind to it
t.wahiduddin: Indeed, their knowledge of the life to come stops short of the truth: they are [often] in doubt as to its reality: in fact, they are blind to it
t.shakir: Nay, their knowledge respecting the hereafter is slight and hasty; nay, they are in doubt about it; nay, they are quite blind to it
t.haleem: their knowledge cannot comprehend the Hereafter; they are in doubt about it; they are blind to it
t.maariful: Rather, their knowledge has failed in respect of the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are blind to it
t.khattab: No! Their knowledge of the Hereafter amounts to ignorance. In fact, they are in doubt about it. In truth, they are ˹totally˺ blind to it
t.ghali: No indeed, (but) their knowledge has been overtaken (i.e., their knowledge is insignificant) as to the Hereafter; no indeed, they are in doubt of it; no indeed, they are willfully blind to it
t.irving: nor does their knowledge grasp the Hereafter. Rather they are in doubt and indeed they are blind concerning it
t.iwq: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind

t_id.kemenag: Sebenarnya pengetahuan mereka tentang akhirat tidak sampai (kesana) malahan mereka ragu-ragu tentang akhirat itu, lebih-lebih lagi mereka buta daripadanya.
t_id.sabiq: Pengetahuan mereka tentang akhirat yang berawal dari ketidaktahuan berubah menjadi keraguan. Mereka bagaikan orang buta, karena tidak mau berusaha mencari alasan-alasan yang membenarkan adanya hari akhir. Hal itu lantaran mata hati mereka telah dirusak oleh kesesatan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah) lafal Bal di sini bermakna Hal, yakni apakah (sampai ke sana) lafal Iddaraka pada asalnya adalah Tadaraka, kemudian huruf Ta diganti menjadi Dal kemudian di-idgam-kan kepada Dal, lalu ditariklah Hamzali Washal, artinya sama dengan lafal Balagha, Lahiqa, atau Tataba'a dan Talahaqa, yaitu, sampai ke sana. Menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Adraka menurut wazan Akrama, sehingga artinya menjadi, Apakah telah sampai ke sana (pengetahuan mereka tentang akhirat?) yakni mengenai hari akhirat, sehingga mereka menanyakan tentang kedatangannya. Pada kenyataannya tidaklah demikian (sebenarnya mereka ragu-ragu tentang akhirat itu, bahkan mereka buta daripadanya) 'Amuna berasal dari kata Umyul Qalbi yang artinya buta hatinya; pengertian ungkapan ini lebih mengena daripada kalimat sebelumnya. Pada asalnya lafal 'Amuna adalah 'Amiyuna, oleh karena harakat Dhammah atas Ya dianggap berat untuk diucapkan, maka harakat Dhammah-nya dipindahkan kepada Mim, hal ini dilakukan sesudah terlebih dahulu harakat Kasrah-nya dibuang, sehingga jadilah 'Amuna.
t_id.iwq: Sebenarnya pengetahuan mereka tentang akhirat tidak sampai (kesana) malahan mereka ragu-ragu tentang akhirat itu, lebih-lebih lagi mereka buta daripadanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «بل» بمعنى هل «أدرك» وزن أكرم، وفي قراءة أخرى ادّارَكَ بتشديد الدال وأصله تدارك أبدلت التاء دالاً وأدغمت في الدال واجتلبت همزة الوصل أي بلغ ولحق أو تتابع وتلاحق «علمهم في الآخرة» أي بها حتى سألوا عن وقت مجيئها ليس الأمر كذلك «بل هم في شك منها بل هم منها عمون» من عمى القلب وهو أبلغ مما قبله والأصل عميون استثقلت الضمة على الياء فنقلت إلى الميم بعد حذف كسرتها
tafsir.siraj-ar: بَلِ ٱدَّـٰرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُم مِّنۡهَا عَمُونَ (ادَّارَكَ: تَكَامَلَ أَوِ انْتَهَى عِلْمُهُمْ وَعَجَزَ عَنْ مَعْرِفَةِ وَقْتِهَا, عَمِونَ: عَمِيَتْ بَصَائِرُهُمْ عَنْهَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah) lafal Bal di sini bermakna Hal, yakni apakah (sampai ke sana) lafal Iddaraka pada asalnya adalah Tadaraka, kemudian huruf Ta diganti menjadi Dal kemudian di-idgam-kan kepada Dal, lalu ditariklah Hamzali Washal, artinya sama dengan lafal Balagha, Lahiqa, atau Tataba'a dan Talahaqa, yaitu, sampai ke sana. Menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Adraka menurut wazan Akrama, sehingga artinya menjadi, Apakah telah sampai ke sana (pengetahuan mereka tentang akhirat?) yakni mengenai hari akhirat, sehingga mereka menanyakan tentang kedatangannya. Pada kenyataannya tidaklah demikian (sebenarnya mereka ragu-ragu tentang akhirat itu, bahkan mereka buta daripadanya) 'Amuna berasal dari kata Umyul Qalbi yang artinya buta hatinya; pengertian ungkapan ini lebih mengena daripada kalimat sebelumnya. Pada asalnya lafal 'Amuna adalah 'Amiyuna, oleh karena harakat Dhammah atas Ya dianggap berat untuk diucapkan, maka harakat Dhammah-nya dipindahkan kepada Mim, hal ini dilakukan sesudah terlebih dahulu harakat Kasrah-nya dibuang, sehingga jadilah 'Amuna

ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِینَ كَفَرُوۤا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرَ ٰبࣰا وَءَابَاۤؤُنَاۤ أَئِنَّا لَمُخۡرَجُونَ
ar_simple: وَقَالَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا أَإِذَا كُنَّا تُرَابًا وَآبَاؤُنَا أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَ
transliteration: waqāla alladhīna kafarū a-idhā kunnā turāban waābāunā a-innā lamukh'rajūna

t.sahih-int: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out [of the graves]
t.asad: And so, they who are bent on denying the truth are saying: “What! After we have become dust - we and our forefathers - shall we [all], forsooth, be brought forth [from the dead]
t.yusuf-ali: The Unbelievers say: "What! when we become dust,- we and our fathers,- shall we really be raised (from the dead)
t.pickthall: Yet those who disbelieve say: When we have become dust like our fathers, shall we verily be brought forth (again)
t.arberry: The unbelievers say, 'What, when we are dust, and our fathers, shall we indeed be brought forth
t.hilali-khan: And those who disbelieve say: "When we have become dust, we and our fathers, shall we really be brought forth (again)
t.itani: Those who disbelieve say, “When we have become dust, and our ancestors, shall we be brought out?
t.mubarakpuri: And those who disbelieve say: "When we have become dust -- we and our fathers -- shall we really be brought forth"
t.qarib: So the unbelievers say, "When we and our fathers become dust, will we then be brought out of the graves
t.wahiduddin: Those who deny the truth say, "When we have turned to dust like our fathers, shall we be brought back to life again
t.shakir: And those who disbelieve say: What! when we have become dust and our fathers (too), shall we certainly be brought forth
t.haleem: So the disbelievers say, ‘What! When we and our forefathers have become dust, shall we be brought back to life again
t.maariful: And said those who disbelieved, “Is it that, when we and our fathers become dust,-is it that we shall really be brought forth
t.khattab: The disbelievers ask, “When we and our fathers are reduced to dust, will we really be brought forth ˹alive˺
t.ghali: And the ones who have disbelieved have said, "When we are dust, and our fathers, surely will we indeed be brought out (of the graves)
t.irving: Those who disbelieve say: "When we and our forefathers have become dust, shall we be brought forth again
t.iwq: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out of the graves

t_id.kemenag: Berkatalah orang-orang yang kafir: "Apakah setelah kita menjadi tanah dan (begitu pula) bapak-bapak kita; apakah sesungguhnya kita akan dikeluarkan (dari kubur)?
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang kafir yang mengingkari hari kebangkitan itu mengatakan, "Ketika kami telah menjadi debu, jasad kami dan jasad nenek moyang kami pun telah hancur lebur, apakah kami akan dihidupkan kembali?
t_id.jalalayn-id: Berkata pula orang-orang kafir) yang mengingkari adanya hari berbangkit ("Apakah setelah kita menjadi tanah dan begitu pula bapak-bapak kita; apakah sesungguhnya kita akan dikeluarkan kembali?) dari kuburan kita, maksudnya akan dihidupkan kembali.
t_id.iwq: Berkatalah orang-orang yang kafir: "Apakah setelah kita menjadi tanah dan (begitu pula) bapak-bapak kita; apakah sesungguhnya kita akan dikeluarkan (dari kubur)?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقال الذين كفروا» أيضاً في إنكار البعث «أئذا كنا تراباً وآباؤنا أئنا لمخرجون» من القبور
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرَٰبٗا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخۡرَجُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkata pula orang-orang kafir) yang mengingkari adanya hari berbangkit ("Apakah setelah kita menjadi tanah dan begitu pula bapak-bapak kita; apakah sesungguhnya kita akan dikeluarkan kembali?) dari kuburan kita, maksudnya akan dihidupkan kembali

ar: لَقَدۡ وُعِدۡنَا هَـٰذَا نَحۡنُ وَءَابَاۤؤُنَا مِن قَبۡلُ إِنۡ هَـٰذَاۤ إِلَّاۤ أَسَـٰطِیرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِینَ
ar_simple: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا هَٰذَا نَحْنُ وَآبَاؤُنَا مِنْ قَبْلُ إِنْ هَٰذَا إِلَّا أَسَاطِيرُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
transliteration: laqad wuʿid'nā hādhā naḥnu waābāunā min qablu in hādhā illā asāṭīru l-awalīna

t.sahih-int: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples
t.asad: Indeed, we were promised this - we and our forefathers - in the past as well; it is nothing but fables of ancient times!”
t.yusuf-ali: It is true we were promised this,- we and our fathers before (us): these are nothing but tales of the ancients
t.pickthall: We were promised this, forsooth, we and our fathers. (All) this is naught but fables of the men of old
t.arberry: We have been promised this, and our fathers before; this is naught but the fairy-tales of the ancients
t.hilali-khan: Indeed we were promised this, we and our forefathers before, Verily, these are nothing but tales of ancients
t.itani: We were promised that before, we and our ancestors—these are nothing but legends of the ancients.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Indeed we were promised this -- we and our forefathers before, verily, these are nothing but tales of ancients."
t.qarib: We and our forefathers have been promised this before. This is only a legend of an ancient people
t.wahiduddin: We and our fathers were promised this before; these are but old stories
t.shakir: We have certainly been promised this, we and our fathers before; these are naught but stories of the ancients
t.haleem: We have heard such promises before, and so did our forefathers. These are just ancient fables.’
t.maariful: Indeed, it was promised to us and to our fathers even before this. This is nothing but the tales of the ancients.”
t.khattab: We have already been promised this, as well as our forefathers earlier. This is nothing but ancient fables!”
t.ghali: Indeed, we have already been promised this, we and our fathers earlier. Decidedly this is (nothing) except myths of the earliest (people)
t.irving: We and our forefathers were promised this before; these are only legends [made up] by primitive men
t.iwq: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya kami telah diberi ancaman dengan ini dan (juga) bapak-bapak kami dahulu; ini tidak lain hanyalah dongengan-dongengan orang dahulu kala".
t_id.sabiq: Muhammad telah mengingatkan kami akan datangnya hari kebangkitan itu, persis seperti apa yang dikatakan oleh rasul-rasul sebelumnya kepada moyang-moyang kami. Jika benar apa yang dikatakannya itu, mestinya telah terbukti. Tapi kenyatannya itu hanya kebohongan orang-orang yang telah lalu."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kami telah diberi ancaman dengan ini dan juga bapak-bapak kami dahulu, tiada lain) yakni tidak lain (ini hanyalah dongeng-dongengan orang dahulu kala") lafal Asathir bentuk jamak dari lafal Usthurah, artinya dongeng yang tidak ada kenyataannya, atau cerita dusta.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya kami telah diberi ancaman dengan ini dan (juga) bapak-bapak kami dahulu; ini tidak lain hanyalah dongengan-dongengan orang dahulu kala".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لقد وعدنا هذا نحن وآباؤنا من قبل إن» ما «هذا إلا أساطير الأولين» جمع أسطورة بالضم أي ما سطر من الكذب
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَقَدۡ وُعِدۡنَا هَٰذَا نَحۡنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبۡلُ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ (أَسَاطِيرُ الْأَوَّلِينَ: مَا سَطَّرَ القُدَمَاءُ مِنَ الأَكَاذِيبِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kami telah diberi ancaman dengan ini dan juga bapak-bapak kami dahulu, tiada lain) yakni tidak lain (ini hanyalah dongeng-dongengan orang dahulu kala") lafal Asathir bentuk jamak dari lafal Usthurah, artinya dongeng yang tidak ada kenyataannya, atau cerita dusta

ar: قُلۡ سِیرُوا۟ فِی ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَیۡفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِینَ
ar_simple: قُلْ سِيرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ فَانْظُرُوا كَيْفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الْمُجْرِمِينَ
transliteration: qul sīrū fī l-arḍi fa-unẓurū kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu l-muj'rimīna

t.sahih-int: Say, [O Muhammad], "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals
t.asad: Say: “Go all over the earth and behold what happened in the end to those [who were thus] lost in sin!”
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "Go ye through the earth and see what has been the end of those guilty (of sin)
t.pickthall: Say (unto them, O Muhammad): Travel in the land and see the nature of the sequel for the guilty
t.arberry: Say: 'Journey in the land, then behold how was the end of the sinners
t.hilali-khan: Say to them (O Muhammad SAW) "Travel in the land and see how has been the end of the criminals (those who denied Allah's Messengers and disobeyed Allah)
t.itani: Say, travel through the earth, and observe the fate of the guilty.”
t.mubarakpuri: Say to them: "Travel in the land and see how has been the end of the criminals."
t.qarib: Say, "Travel around the earth and observe the fate of those who are guilty of forcing others to reject God's messages
t.wahiduddin: Say, "Roam across the earth and observe what was the end of the sinful ones
t.shakir: Say: Travel in the earth, then see how was the end of the guilty
t.haleem: [Prophet], say, ‘Travel through the earth and see how the evildoers ended up.’
t.maariful: Say, “Travel in the land and see how was the fate of the sinners.”
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “Travel throughout the land and see the fate of the wicked.”
t.ghali: Say, "Travel in the earth, then look into how was the end of the criminals
t.irving: SAY: "Travel around the earth and see what the outcome for criminals was like
t.iwq: Say, O Muhammad, "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Berjalanlah kamu (di muka) bumi, lalu perhatikanlah bagaimana akibat orang-orang yang berdosa.
t_id.sabiq: Wahai Muhammad, katakan kepada mereka, "Berjalanlah sampai ke ujung dunia, lalu perhatikanlah bukti-bukti sejarah yang ditinggalkan oleh orang-orang pendusta yang diazab Allah, agar kalian dapat mengambil pelajaran yang membuat kalian takut akan azab-Nya!"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah!, "Berjalanlah kalian di muka bumi, lalu perhatikanlah bagaimana akibat orang-orang yang berdosa) karena ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit, yaitu dibinasakan-Nya mereka oleh azab-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Berjalanlah kamu (di muka) bumi, lalu perhatikanlah bagaimana akibat orang-orang yang berdosa.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل سيروا في الأرض فانظروا كيف كان عاقبة المجرمين» بإنكارهم، وهي هلاكهم بالعذاب
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُلۡ سِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَٱنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah!, "Berjalanlah kalian di muka bumi, lalu perhatikanlah bagaimana akibat orang-orang yang berdosa) karena ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit, yaitu dibinasakan-Nya mereka oleh azab-Nya

ar: وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَیۡهِمۡ وَلَا تَكُن فِی ضَیۡقࣲ مِّمَّا یَمۡكُرُونَ
ar_simple: وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُنْ فِي ضَيْقٍ مِمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ
transliteration: walā taḥzan ʿalayhim walā takun fī ḍayqin mimmā yamkurūna

t.sahih-int: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire
t.asad: But do not grieve over them, and neither be distressed by the false arguments which they devise [against God's messages]
t.yusuf-ali: But grieve not over them, nor distress thyself because of their plots
t.pickthall: And grieve thou not for them, nor be in distress because of what they plot (against thee)
t.arberry: Do not sorrow for them, nor be thou straitened for what they devise
t.hilali-khan: And grieve you not for them, nor be straitened (in distress) because of what they plot
t.itani: But do not grieve over them, and do not be troubled by what they plot.
t.mubarakpuri: And grieve you not over them, nor be straitened (in distress) because of what they plot.
t.qarib: [Prophet,] do not grieve over them or be distressed by what they conspire
t.wahiduddin: Do not grieve over them, nor feel distressed at their schemes
t.shakir: And grieve not for them and be not distressed because of what they plan
t.haleem: [Prophet], do not grieve over them; do not be distressed by their schemes
t.maariful: And do not grieve for them, nor should your heart be straitened because of what they plan
t.khattab: Do not grieve for them, nor be distressed by their schemes
t.ghali: And do not grieve for them nor be straitened for what they scheme
t.irving: Do not worry about them nor feel any anxiety over whatever they are plotting
t.iwq: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire

t_id.kemenag: Dan janganlah kamu berduka cita terhadap mereka, dan janganlah (dadamu) merasa sempit terhadap apa yang mereka tipudayakan".
t_id.sabiq: Kamu tidak perlu merasa duka dengan ulah orang-orang kafir yang enggan mengikuti agamamu, Muhammad. Tugasmu hanyalah menyampaikan pesan-pesan kerasulan Kami. Jangan merasa khawatir pada makar dan rencana-rencana jahat mereka, karena Kami benar-benar akan menolongmu atas mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kamu berduka cita terhadap mereka dan janganlah dadamu merasa sempit terhadap apa yang mereka tipu dayakan") ayat ini merupakan hiburan dan penenang hati Nabi saw. Maksudnya, janganlah kamu hiraukan makar mereka terhadap dirimu, karena sesungguhnya Kami akan menolong kamu dari mereka.
t_id.iwq: Dan janganlah kamu berduka cita terhadap mereka, dan janganlah (dadamu) merasa sempit terhadap apa yang mereka tipudayakan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولا تحزن عليهم ولا تكن في ضيق مما يمكرون» تسلية للنبي * أي لا تهتم بمكرهم عليك فإنا ناصروك عليهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَا تَكُن فِي ضَيۡقٖ مِّمَّا يَمۡكُرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kamu berduka cita terhadap mereka dan janganlah dadamu merasa sempit terhadap apa yang mereka tipu dayakan") ayat ini merupakan hiburan dan penenang hati Nabi saw. Maksudnya, janganlah kamu hiraukan makar mereka terhadap dirimu, karena sesungguhnya Kami akan menolong kamu dari mereka

ar: وَیَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَـٰدِقِینَ
ar_simple: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا الْوَعْدُ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ صَادِقِينَ
transliteration: wayaqūlūna matā hādhā l-waʿdu in kuntum ṣādiqīna

t.sahih-int: And they say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you should be truthful
t.asad: And [when] they ask, “When is this promise [of resurrection] to be fulfilled? [Answer this, O you who believe in it,] if you are men of truth!” –
t.yusuf-ali: They also say: "When will this promise (come to pass)? (Say) if ye are truthful
t.pickthall: And they say: When (will) this promise (be fulfilled), if ye are truthful
t.arberry: They say, 'When shall this promise come to pass, if you speak the truth
t.hilali-khan: And they (the disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah) say: "When (will) this promise (be fulfilled), if you are truthful
t.itani: And they say, “When is this promise, if you are truthful?”
t.mubarakpuri: And they say: "When this promise, if you are truthful"
t.qarib: They say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you are truthful
t.wahiduddin: They ask, "When will this promise be fulfilled, if what you say be true
t.shakir: And they say: When will this threat come to pass, if you are truthful
t.haleem: They also say, ‘When will this promise be fulfilled if what you say is true?’
t.maariful: They say, “When shall this promise come to pass if you are true?”
t.khattab: They ask ˹the believers˺, “When will this threat come to pass, if what you say is true?”
t.ghali: And they say, "When will this promise (come to pass), in case you are sincere
t.irving: They are saying: "When will this promise be, if you are so truthful
t.iwq: And they say, "When is the fulfillment of this promise, if you should be truthful

t_id.kemenag: Dan mereka (orang-orang kafir) berkata: "Bilakah datangnya azab itu, jika memang kamu orang-orang yang benar".
t_id.sabiq: Pendustaan orang-orang kafir itu telah sampai pada puncaknya. Mereka meminta agar siksa itu segera didatangkan dengan mengatakan, "Kapan akan datang siksa yang kamu ancamkan kepada kami itu? Mana azab yang akan menimpa orang-orang yang berdusta seperti kami itu? Buktikan, jika perkataanmu memang benar!"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata, "Bilakah datangnya ancaman itu) azab yang diancamkan itu (jika memang kamu orang-orang yang benar.") di dalam pengakuanmu itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan mereka (orang-orang kafir) berkata: "Bilakah datangnya azab itu, jika memang kamu orang-orang yang benar".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ويقولون متى هذا الوعد» بالعذاب «إن كنتم صادقين» فيه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata, "Bilakah datangnya ancaman itu) azab yang diancamkan itu (jika memang kamu orang-orang yang benar.") di dalam pengakuanmu itu

ar: قُلۡ عَسَىٰۤ أَن یَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعۡضُ ٱلَّذِی تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
ar_simple: قُلْ عَسَىٰ أَنْ يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُمْ بَعْضُ الَّذِي تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
transliteration: qul ʿasā an yakūna radifa lakum baʿḍu alladhī tastaʿjilūna

t.sahih-int: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you - some of that for which you are impatient
t.asad: say thou: “It may well be that something of that which [in your ignorance] you so hastily demands has already drawn close unto you.”
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "It may be that some of the events which ye wish to hasten on may be (close) in your pursuit
t.pickthall: Say: It may be that a part of that which ye would hasten on is close behind you
t.arberry: Say: 'It may be that riding behind you already is some part of that you seek to hasten on
t.hilali-khan: Say: "Perhaps that which you wish to hasten on, may be close behind you
t.itani: Say, “Perhaps some of what you are impatient for has drawn near.”
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "Perhaps that which you wish to hasten on, may be close behind you."
t.qarib: Say, "Perhaps some of what you seem eager for is closer than you think
t.wahiduddin: Say, "It may be that a part of what you would hasten on is close behind you
t.shakir: Say: Maybe there may have drawn near to you somewhat of that which you seek to hasten on
t.haleem: Say, ‘Maybe some of what you seek to hasten is near at hand.’
t.maariful: Say, “It is not unlikely that some part of that (punishment) which you are asking to come soon is already following you closely.”
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “Perhaps some of what you seek to hasten is close at hand.”
t.ghali: Say, "It may be that coming immediately after you is some (part) of that which you seek to hasten
t.irving: SAY: "Perhaps part of what you are try to hurry up will catch you from behind
t.iwq: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you - some of that for which you are impatient

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Mungkin telah hampir datang kepadamu sebagian dari (azab) yang kamu minta (supaya) disegerakan itu.
t_id.sabiq: Katakan kepada mereka, wahai Muhammad, "Jangan-jangan sebagian azab yang kalian minta disegerakan itu sudah dekat dan akan menimpa kalian."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah!, "Mungkin telah hampir datang) artinya telah dekat (kepada kalian sebagian dari azab yang kalian minta supaya disegerakan itu.") maka terjadilah hal itu, yaitu dengan dibunuhnya mereka dalam perang Badar, sedangkan azab yang lainnya akan menimpa mereka sesudah mereka mati.
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Mungkin telah hampir datang kepadamu sebagian dari (azab) yang kamu minta (supaya) disegerakan itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل عسى أن يكون رَدِفَ» قرب «لكم بعض الذي تستعجلون» فحصل لهم القتل ببدر وباقي العذاب يأتيهم بعد الموت
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُلۡ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعۡضُ ٱلَّذِي تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ (رَدِفَ لَكُم: اقْتَرَبَ لَكُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah!, "Mungkin telah hampir datang) artinya telah dekat (kepada kalian sebagian dari azab yang kalian minta supaya disegerakan itu.") maka terjadilah hal itu, yaitu dengan dibunuhnya mereka dalam perang Badar, sedangkan azab yang lainnya akan menimpa mereka sesudah mereka mati

ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضۡلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا یَشۡكُرُونَ
ar_simple: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى النَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ
transliteration: wa-inna rabbaka ladhū faḍlin ʿalā l-nāsi walākinna aktharahum lā yashkurūna

t.sahih-int: And indeed, your Lord is full of bounty for the people, but most of them do not show gratitude
t.asad: Now, verily, thy Sustainer is indeed limitless in His bounty unto men - but most of them are bereft of gratitude
t.yusuf-ali: But verily thy Lord is full of grace to mankind: Yet most of them are ungrateful
t.pickthall: Lo! thy Lord is full of bounty for mankind, but most of them do not give thanks
t.arberry: Surely thy Lord is bountiful to men; but most of them are not thankful
t.hilali-khan: Verily, your Lord is full of Grace for mankind, yet most of them do not give thanks
t.itani: Your Lord is gracious towards humanity, but most of them are not thankful.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, your Lord is full of grace for mankind, yet most of them do not give thanks.
t.qarib: Verily your Lord is bountiful to people, but most of them do not show gratitude
t.wahiduddin: Truly, your Lord is bountiful to mankind, but most of them are not grateful
t.shakir: And surely your Lord is the Lord of grace to men, but most of them are not grateful
t.haleem: Your Lord is bountiful to people, though most of them are ungrateful
t.maariful: And surely, your Lord is graceful for the mankind, but most of the people are not grateful
t.khattab: Surely your Lord is ever Bountiful to humanity, but most of them are ungrateful
t.ghali: And surely your Lord is indeed The Owner of Grace to mankind; but most of them do not thank (Him)
t.irving: Your Lord possesses bounty for mankind, although most of them are not thankful
t.iwq: And verily, your Lord is full of bounty for the people, but most of them do not show gratitude

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu benar-benar mempunyai kurnia yang besar (yang diberikan-Nya) kepada manusia, tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mensyukuri(nya).
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya Allah Swt. adalah Tuhan yang memberikan nikmat dan kebaikan-kebaikan bagi seluruh manusia. Di antara wujud rahmat-Nya itu adalah penundaan hukuman yang akan dikenakan atas orang-orang yang berdusta. Akan tetapi kebanyakan manusia tidak mensyukuri karunia Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, benar-benar mempunyai karunia yang besar yang diberikan-Nya kepada manusia) antara lain; penangguhan azab atas orang-orang kafir (tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mensyukurinya) orang-orang kafir tidak mensyukuri ditangguhkannya azab atas mereka, karena mereka tidak mempercayai akan adanya azab itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu benar-benar mempunyai kurnia yang besar (yang diberikan-Nya) kepada manusia, tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mensyukuri(nya).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن ربك لذو فضل على الناس» ومنه تأخير العذاب عن الكفار «ولكن أكثرهم لا يشكرون» فالكفار لا يشكرون تأخير العذاب لإنكارهم وقوعه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضۡلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, benar-benar mempunyai karunia yang besar yang diberikan-Nya kepada manusia) antara lain; penangguhan azab atas orang-orang kafir (tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mensyukurinya) orang-orang kafir tidak mensyukuri ditangguhkannya azab atas mereka, karena mereka tidak mempercayai akan adanya azab itu

ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَیَعۡلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمۡ وَمَا یُعۡلِنُونَ
ar_simple: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمْ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
transliteration: wa-inna rabbaka layaʿlamu mā tukinnu ṣudūruhum wamā yuʿ'linūna

t.sahih-int: And indeed, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare
t.asad: But, verily, thy Sustainer knows all that their hearts conceal as well as all that they bring into the open
t.yusuf-ali: And verily thy Lord knoweth all that their hearts do hide. As well as all that they reveal
t.pickthall: Lo! thy Lord knoweth surely all that their bosoms hide, and all that they proclaim
t.arberry: Surely thy Lord knows what their hearts conceal, and what they publish
t.hilali-khan: And verily, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they reveal
t.itani: And your Lord knows what their hearts conceal, and what they reveal.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they reveal.
t.qarib: Certainly your Lord knows what their hearts conceal and what they declare
t.wahiduddin: The Lord knows full well what they conceal in their hearts and what they disclose
t.shakir: And most surely your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they manifest
t.haleem: He knows everything their hearts conceal and everything they reveal
t.maariful: Of course, your Lord knows for sure what their hearts conceal and what they reveal
t.khattab: And surely your Lord knows what their hearts conceal and what they reveal
t.ghali: And surely your Lord knows indeed whatever their breasts carefully secrete and whatever they make public
t.irving: yet your Lord does know anything your breasts conceal as well as anything they display
t.iwq: And verily, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, benar-benar mengetahui apa yang disembunyikan hati mereka dan apa yang mereka nyatakan.
t_id.sabiq: Dan Tuhanmu, Muhammad, sungguh Maha Mengetahui segala perkataan dan perbuatan yang mereka rahasiakan dan yang mereka tampakkan. Allah Maha Memberi balasan atas segala yang mereka perbuat itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, benar-benar mengetahui apa yang disembunyikan hati mereka) maksudnya apa yang tersimpan di dalam hati mereka (dan apa yang mereka nyatakan) melalui lisan-lisan mereka.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, benar-benar mengetahui apa yang disembunyikan hati mereka dan apa yang mereka nyatakan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن ربك ليعلم ما تكن صدورهم» تخفيه «وما يعلنون» بألسنتهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمۡ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ (تُكِنُّ: تُخْفِي)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, benar-benar mengetahui apa yang disembunyikan hati mereka) maksudnya apa yang tersimpan di dalam hati mereka (dan apa yang mereka nyatakan) melalui lisan-lisan mereka

ar: وَمَا مِنۡ غَاۤئِبَةࣲ فِی ٱلسَّمَاۤءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِلَّا فِی كِتَـٰبࣲ مُّبِینٍ
ar_simple: وَمَا مِنْ غَائِبَةٍ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ إِلَّا فِي كِتَابٍ مُبِينٍ
transliteration: wamā min ghāibatin fī l-samāi wal-arḍi illā fī kitābin mubīnin

t.sahih-int: And there is nothing concealed within the heaven and the earth except that it is in a clear Register
t.asad: for there is nothing [so deeply] hidden in the heavens or on earth but is recorded in [His] clear decree
t.yusuf-ali: Nor is there aught of the unseen, in heaven or earth, but is (recorded) in a clear record
t.pickthall: And there is nothing hidden in the heaven or the earth but it is in a clear Record
t.arberry: And not a thing is there hidden in heaven and earth but it is in a Manifest Book
t.hilali-khan: And there is nothing hidden in the heaven and the earth, but is in a Clear Book (i.e. Al-Lauh Al-Mahfuz)
t.itani: There is no mystery in the heaven and the earth, but it is in a Clear Book.
t.mubarakpuri: And there is nothing hidden in the heaven and the earth but it is in a Clear Book.
t.qarib: for there is nothing [so] hidden in heaven and earth that it is not in a clear record
t.wahiduddin: there is nothing hidden in heaven and on earth, but is recorded in a clear Book
t.shakir: And there is nothing concealed in the heaven and the earth but it is in a clear book
t.haleem: there is nothing hidden in the heavens or on earth that is not in a clear Record
t.maariful: There is nothing hidden in the heavens and the earth that is not (recorded) in a manifest book
t.khattab: For there is nothing hidden in the heavens or the earth without being ˹written˺ in a perfect Record
t.ghali: And in no way is there an unseen thing in the heaven or the earth except that it is in an evident Book
t.irving: There is nothing elsewhere in either Heaven or Earth unless it appears in a plain Book
t.iwq: And there is nothing concealed within the heaven and the earth except that it is in a clear Register

t_id.kemenag: Tiada sesuatupun yang ghaib di langit dan di bumi, melainkan (terdapat) dalam kitab yang nyata (Lauhul Mahfuzh).
t_id.sabiq: Tak ada sesuatu yang tersembunyi atau gaib--sekecil dan sehalus apa pun--baik di langit maupun di bumi, yang tidak diketahui dan dicatat oleh Allah dalam kitab yang benar di sisi-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tiada sesuatu pun yang gaib di langit dan di bumi) huruf Ha pada lafal Ghaibah untuk menunjukkan makna Mubalaghah atau sangat, maksudnya sangat gaib di mata manusia (melainkan terdapat dalam kitab yang nyata) yakni Lohmahfuz dan rahasia ilmu Allah swt. antara lain diazabnya orang-orang kafir.
t_id.iwq: Tiada sesuatupun yang ghaib di langit dan di bumi, melainkan (terdapat) dalam kitab yang nyata (Lauhul Mahfuzh).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما من غائبة في السماء والأرض» الهاء للمبالغة: أي شيء في غاية الخفاء على الناس «إلا في كتاب مبين» بَيِّن هو اللوح المحفوظ ومكنون علمه تعالى ومنه تعذيب الكفار
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَا مِنۡ غَآئِبَةٖ فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِلَّا فِي كِتَٰبٖ مُّبِينٍ (غَائِبَةٍ: شَيْءٍ غَائِبٍ عَنِ الأَبْصَارِ, كِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ: هُوَ: اللَّوْحُ المَحْفُوظُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tiada sesuatu pun yang gaib di langit dan di bumi) huruf Ha pada lafal Ghaibah untuk menunjukkan makna Mubalaghah atau sangat, maksudnya sangat gaib di mata manusia (melainkan terdapat dalam kitab yang nyata) yakni Lohmahfuz dan rahasia ilmu Allah swt. antara lain diazabnya orang-orang kafir

ar: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ یَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِیۤ إِسۡرَ ٰۤءِیلَ أَكۡثَرَ ٱلَّذِی هُمۡ فِیهِ یَخۡتَلِفُونَ
ar_simple: إِنَّ هَٰذَا الْقُرْآنَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ أَكْثَرَ الَّذِي هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
transliteration: inna hādhā l-qur'āna yaquṣṣu ʿalā banī is'rāīla akthara alladhī hum fīhi yakhtalifūna

t.sahih-int: Indeed, this Qur'an relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree
t.asad: BEHOLD, this Qur’an explains to the children of Israel most [of that] whereon they hold divergent views
t.yusuf-ali: Verily this Qur'an doth explain to the Children of Israel most of the matters in which they disagree
t.pickthall: Lo! this Qur'an narrateth unto the Children of Israel most of that concerning which they differ
t.arberry: Surely this Koran relates to the Children of Israel most of that concerning which they are at variance
t.hilali-khan: Verily, this Quran narrates to the Children of Israel most of that about which they differ
t.itani: This Quran relates to the Children of Israel most of what they differ about.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, this Qur'an narrates to the Children of Israel most of that in which they differ.
t.qarib: This Revelation [The Qur'an] explains to the Children of Israel most of what they differ about
t.wahiduddin: This Quran explains to the children of Israel much of what they differ over
t.shakir: Surely this Quran declares to the children of Israel most of what they differ in
t.haleem: Truly, this Quran explains to the Children of Israel most of what they differ about
t.maariful: Surely this Qur’ān mentions to the children of Isrā’īl most of the matters in which they dispute
t.khattab: Indeed, this Quran clarifies for the Children of Israel most of what they differ over
t.ghali: Surely this Qur'an an narrates to the Seeds (Or: sons) of Israel most of that concerning which they differ
t.irving: This Reading tells the Children of Israel most of what they have been differing over
t.iwq: Indeed, this Qur'an relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Al Quran ini menjelaskan kepada Bani lsrail sebahagian besar dari (perkara-perkara) yang mereka berselisih tentangnya.
t_id.sabiq: Sesunggguhnya kitab suci yang diwahyukan kepada Muhammad itu memberikan penjelasan kepada Banû Isrâ'îl mengenai akidah, hukum dan kisah-kisah yang benar yang termaktub dalam Tawrât, untuk mengembalikan kepada kebenaran atas persoalan-persoalan yang mereka perselisihkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Alquran ini menjelaskan kepada Bani Israel) yang ada di zaman Nabi saw. (sebagian besar dari perkara-perkara yang mereka berselisih tentangnya) dengan menjelaskan hal tersebut sesuai dengan kedudukannya, sehingga hilanglah semua perselisihan yang ada pada mereka, jika mereka mau mengambilnya dan masuk Islam.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Al Al-Quran ini menjelaskan kepada Bani lsrail sebahagian besar dari (perkara-perkara) yang mereka berselisih tentangnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن هذا القرآن يقص على بني إسرائيل» الموجودين في زمان نبينا «أكثر الذي هم فيه يختلفون» أي ببيان ما ذكر على وجهه الرافع للاختلاف بينهم لو أخذوا به وأسلموا
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ أَكۡثَرَ ٱلَّذِي هُمۡ فِيهِ يَخۡتَلِفُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Alquran ini menjelaskan kepada Bani Israel) yang ada di zaman Nabi saw. (sebagian besar dari perkara-perkara yang mereka berselisih tentangnya) dengan menjelaskan hal tersebut sesuai dengan kedudukannya, sehingga hilanglah semua perselisihan yang ada pada mereka, jika mereka mau mengambilnya dan masuk Islam

ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَهُدࣰى وَرَحۡمَةࣱ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: وَإِنَّهُ لَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
transliteration: wa-innahu lahudan waraḥmatun lil'mu'minīna

t.sahih-int: And indeed, it is guidance and mercy for the believers
t.asad: and, verily, it is a guidance and a grace unto all who believe [in it]
t.yusuf-ali: And it certainly is a Guide and a Mercy to those who believe
t.pickthall: And lo! it is a guidance and a mercy for believers
t.arberry: it is a guidance, and a mercy unto the believers
t.hilali-khan: And truly, it (this Quran) is a guide and a mercy to the believers
t.itani: And it is guidance and mercy for the believers.
t.mubarakpuri: And truly, it is a guide and a mercy for the believers.
t.qarib: And It is guidance and mercy for the Believers
t.wahiduddin: certainly it is guidance and a blessing for the believers
t.shakir: And most surely it is a guidance and a mercy for the believers
t.haleem: and it is guidance and grace for those who believe
t.maariful: It is guidance and mercy for the believers
t.khattab: And it is truly a guide and mercy for the believers
t.ghali: And surely it is indeed a guidance and a mercy to the believers
t.irving: it serves as guidance and a mercy for believers
t.iwq: And verily, it is guidance and mercy for the believers

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Al Quran itu benar-benar menjadi petunjuk dan rahmat bagi orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Kitab suci ini adalah petunjuk yang membebaskan manusia dari kesesatan, dan sebagai rahmat yang menyelamatkan orang-orang yang beriman kepadanya dari siksa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: Dan sesungguhnya Alquran itu benar-benar menjadi petunjuk) dari kesesatan (dan rahmat bagi orang-orang yang beriman) yakni terhindar dari azab.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Al Al-Quran itu benar-benar menjadi petunjuk dan rahmat bagi orang-orang yang beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإنه لهدى» من الضلالة «ورحمة للمؤمنين» من العذاب
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَهُدٗى وَرَحۡمَةٞ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Alquran itu benar-benar menjadi petunjuk) dari kesesatan (dan rahmat bagi orang-orang yang beriman) yakni terhindar dari azab

ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ یَقۡضِی بَیۡنَهُم بِحُكۡمِهِۦۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِیزُ ٱلۡعَلِیمُ
ar_simple: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقْضِي بَيْنَهُمْ بِحُكْمِهِ ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْعَلِيمُ
transliteration: inna rabbaka yaqḍī baynahum biḥuk'mihi wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ʿalīmu

t.sahih-int: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them by His [wise] judgement. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Knowing
t.asad: Verily, [O believer,] thy Sustainer will judge between them in His wisdom - for He alone is almighty, all-knowing
t.yusuf-ali: Verily thy Lord will decide between them by His Decree: and He is Exalted in Might, All-Knowing
t.pickthall: Lo! thy Lord will judge between them of His wisdom, and He is the Mighty, the Wise
t.arberry: Surely thy Lord will decide between them by His Judgment; He is the All-mighty, the All-knowing
t.hilali-khan: Verily, your Lord will decide between them (various sects) by His Judgement. And He is the All-Mighty, the All-Knowing
t.itani: Your Lord will judge between them by His wisdom. He is the Almighty, the All-Knowing.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, your Lord will decide between them by His judgement. And He is the All-Mighty, the All-Knowing.
t.qarib: Your Lord will judge between them by His [wise] judgment, for He is the Almighty, the All-Knowing
t.wahiduddin: Certainly your Lord will decide between them in His wisdom, He is the Almighty, the All Knowing
t.shakir: Surely your Lord will judge between them by his judgment, and He is the Mighty, the knowing
t.haleem: Truly, your Lord will judge between them in His wisdom- He is the Almighty, the All Knowing
t.maariful: And surely your Lord will decide between them by His judgment, and He is the All-Mighty, the All-Knowing
t.khattab: Your Lord will certainly judge between them by His justice, for He is the Almighty, All-Knowing
t.ghali: Surely our Lord will decree between them by His Judgment; and He is The Ever-Mighty, The Ever-Knowing
t.irving: Your Lord will judge between them through His discretion; He is the Powerful, the Aware
t.iwq: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them by His wise judgement. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Knowing

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu akan menyelesaikan perkara antara mereka dengan keputusan-Nya, dan Dia Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Mengetahui.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu akan memberikan keputusan pada setiap manusia dengan sifat adil-Nya pada hari kiamat. Dia Mahamenang. Tak seorang pun dapat menolak keputusan-Nya; Maha Mengetahui yang tidak tersamar bagi-Nya antara kepalsuan dan kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Rabbmu akan menyelesaikan perkara di antara mereka) sama dengan orang-orang selain mereka, kelak di hari kiamat (dengan keputusan-Nya) dengan keadilan-Nya. (Dan Dia-lah yang Maha Perkasa) Maha Menang (lagi Maha Mengetahui) tentang ketentuan yang akan diputuskan-Nya, tidak mungkin bagi seorang pun menentangnya, tidak sebagaimana di dunia di mana orang-orang kafir masih dapat menentang Nabi-nabi-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu akan menyelesaikan perkara antara mereka dengan keputusan-Nya, dan Dia Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Mengetahui.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن ربك يقضي بينهم» كغيرهم يوم القيامة «بحكمه» أي عدله «وهو العزيز» الغالب «العليم» بما يحكم به فلا يمكن أحداً مخالفته كما خالف الكفار في الدنيا أنبياءه
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقۡضِي بَيۡنَهُم بِحُكۡمِهِۦۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Rabbmu akan menyelesaikan perkara di antara mereka) sama dengan orang-orang selain mereka, kelak di hari kiamat (dengan keputusan-Nya) dengan keadilan-Nya. (Dan Dia-lah yang Maha Perkasa) Maha Menang (lagi Maha Mengetahui) tentang ketentuan yang akan diputuskan-Nya, tidak mungkin bagi seorang pun menentangnya, tidak sebagaimana di dunia di mana orang-orang kafir masih dapat menentang Nabi-nabi-Nya

ar: فَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَى ٱللَّهِۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَى ٱلۡحَقِّ ٱلۡمُبِینِ
ar_simple: فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَى الْحَقِّ الْمُبِينِ
transliteration: fatawakkal ʿalā l-lahi innaka ʿalā l-ḥaqi l-mubīni

t.sahih-int: So rely upon Allah; indeed, you are upon the clear truth
t.asad: Hence, place thy trust in God [alone] - for, behold, that in which thou believest is truth self-evident
t.yusuf-ali: So put thy trust in Allah: for thou art on (the path of) manifest Truth
t.pickthall: Therefor (O Muhammad) put thy trust in Allah, for thou (standest) on the plain Truth
t.arberry: So put thy trust in God; thou art upon the manifest truth
t.hilali-khan: So put your trust in Allah; surely, you (O Muhammad SAW) are on manifest truth
t.itani: So rely on God. You are upon the clear truth.
t.mubarakpuri: So, put your trust in Allah; surely, you are on manifest truth.
t.qarib: So put your trust in God; you are on the path of clear Truth
t.wahiduddin: so put your trust in God. Surely you are on the path of manifest truth
t.shakir: Therefore rely on Allah; surely you are on the clear truth
t.haleem: so [Prophet], put your trust in God, you are on the path of clear truth
t.maariful: So trust in Allah. Surely you are on the clear truth
t.khattab: So put your trust in Allah, for you are surely upon the ˹Path of˺ clear truth
t.ghali: So put your trust in Allah; surely you are upon the evident Truth
t.irving: So rely on God, since you hold manifest Truth
t.iwq: Thus rely upon Allah; verily, you are upon the clear truth

t_id.kemenag: Sebab itu bertakwalah kepada Allah, sesungguhnya kamu berada di atas kebenaran yang nyata.
t_id.sabiq: Oleh karena itu, serahkan segala urusanmu kepada Allah. Teruslah berdakwah dengan penuh keyakinan akan datangnya kemenangan, karena kamu memang berada pada kebenaran yang jelas. Ulah orang-orang yang mengingkarimu itu tidak akan membawa kerugian apa-apa bagi dirimu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sebab itu bertakwalah kepada Allah) percayakanlah kepada-Nya (sesungguhnya kamu berada di atas kebenaran yang nyata) yakni agama yang nyata, maka akibatnya kamulah yang akan mendapat kemenangan atas orang-orang kafir. Kemudian pada ayat selanjutnya Allah membuat perumpamaan tentang orang-orang kafir, sebagai orang-orang mati, tuli dan buta, untuk itu Allah swt. berfirman,
t_id.iwq: Sebab itu bertakwalah kepada Allah, sesungguhnya kamu berada di atas kebenaran yang nyata.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فتوكل على الله» ثق به «إنك على الحق المبين» الدين البيِّن فالعاقبة لك بالنصر على الكفار ثم ضرب أمثالاً لهم بالموتى والصم والعمي فقال
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَى ٱللَّهِۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَى ٱلۡحَقِّ ٱلۡمُبِينِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sebab itu bertakwalah kepada Allah) percayakanlah kepada-Nya (sesungguhnya kamu berada di atas kebenaran yang nyata) yakni agama yang nyata, maka akibatnya kamulah yang akan mendapat kemenangan atas orang-orang kafir. Kemudian pada ayat selanjutnya Allah membuat perumpamaan tentang orang-orang kafir, sebagai orang-orang mati, tuli dan buta, untuk itu Allah swt. berfirman

ar: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَلَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَاۤءَ إِذَا وَلَّوۡا۟ مُدۡبِرِینَ
ar_simple: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ الْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ الصُّمَّ الدُّعَاءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا مُدْبِرِينَ
transliteration: innaka lā tus'miʿu l-mawtā walā tus'miʿu l-ṣuma l-duʿāa idhā wallaw mud'birīna

t.sahih-int: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating
t.asad: [But,] verily, thou canst not make the dead hear: and [so, too,] thou canst not make the deaf [of heart] hear this call when they turn their backs [on thee] and go away
t.yusuf-ali: Truly thou canst not cause the dead to listen, nor canst thou cause the deaf to hear the call, (especially) when they turn back in retreat
t.pickthall: Lo! thou canst not make the dead to hear, nor canst thou make the deaf to hear the call when they have turned to flee
t.arberry: Thou shalt not make the dead to hear, neither shalt thou make the deaf to hear the call when they turn about, retreating
t.hilali-khan: Verily, you cannot make the dead to hear (i.e. benefit them and similarly the disbelievers), nor can you make the deaf to hear the call, when they flee, turning their backs
t.itani: You cannot make the dead hear, nor can you make the deaf hear the call if they turn their backs and flee.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, you cannot make the dead to hear nor can you make the deaf to hear the call, when they flee, turning their backs.
t.qarib: You will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf listen to the call when they have turned their backs and gone away
t.wahiduddin: You cannot make the dead hear, nor can you make the deaf hear your call, when they turn their backs on it
t.shakir: Surely you do not make the dead to hear, and you do not make the deaf to hear the call when they go back retreating
t.haleem: You cannot make the dead hear, you cannot make the deaf listen to your call when they turn their backs and leave
t.maariful: Surely, you cannot make the dead to hear, nor can you make the deaf to hear your call when they turn their backs in retreat
t.khattab: You certainly cannot make the dead hear ˹the truth˺. Nor can you make the deaf hear the call when they turn their backs and walk away
t.ghali: Surely you will not make the dead to hear, nor will you make the deaf to hear the call when they turn away, withdrawing
t.irving: You cannot make the dead hear, nor even the deaf hear the Appeal once they turn around to escape
t.iwq: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya kamu tidak dapat menjadikan orang-orang yang mati mendengar dan (tidak pula) menjadikan orang-orang yang tuli mendengar panggilan, apabila mereka telah berpaling membelakang.
t_id.sabiq: Sungguh kamu, Muhammad, tidak akan dapat mendatangkan hidayah kepada orang-orang kafir. Mereka tidak sadar, bagaikan orang mati. Mereka juga tidak dapat mendengar bagaikan orang yang kehilangan indera pendengarnya. Mereka tidak memiliki kesiapan mendengarkan dakwahmu, karena mereka telah terlanjur larut dalam sikap berpaling darimu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: ("Sesungguhnya kamu tidak dapat menjadikan orang-orang yang mati mendengar dan tidak pula menjadikan orang-orang yang tuli mendengar panggilan, apabila) dapat dibaca Tahqiq dan Tas-hil (mereka telah berpaling membelakang).
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya kamu tidak dapat menjadikan orang-orang yang mati mendengar dan (tidak pula) menjadikan orang-orang yang tuli mendengar panggilan, apabila mereka telah berpaling membelakang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنك لا تسمع الموتى ولا تسمع الصم الدعاء إذا» بتحقيق الهمزتين وتسهيل الثانية بينها وبين الياء «ولوا مدبرين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَلَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوۡاْ مُدۡبِرِينَ (وَلَّوْا مُدْبِرِينَ: أَعْرَضُوا عَنْكَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kamu tidak dapat menjadikan orang-orang yang mati mendengar dan tidak pula menjadikan orang-orang yang tuli mendengar panggilan, apabila) dapat dibaca Tahqiq dan Tas-hil (mereka telah berpaling membelakang)

ar: وَمَاۤ أَنتَ بِهَـٰدِی ٱلۡعُمۡیِ عَن ضَلَـٰلَتِهِمۡۖ إِن تُسۡمِعُ إِلَّا مَن یُؤۡمِنُ بِءَایَـٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسۡلِمُونَ
ar_simple: وَمَا أَنْتَ بِهَادِي الْعُمْيِ عَنْ ضَلَالَتِهِمْ ۖ إِنْ تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَنْ يُؤْمِنُ بِآيَاتِنَا فَهُمْ مُسْلِمُونَ
transliteration: wamā anta bihādī l-ʿum'yi ʿan ḍalālatihim in tus'miʿu illā man yu'minu biāyātinā fahum mus'limūna

t.sahih-int: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [submitting to Allah]
t.asad: just as thou canst not lead the blind [of heart] out of their error; none canst thou make hear save such as [are willing to] believe in Our messages, and thus surrender themselves unto Us
t.yusuf-ali: Nor canst thou be a guide to the blind, (to prevent them) from straying: only those wilt thou get to listen who believe in Our Signs, and they will bow in Islam
t.pickthall: Nor canst thou lead the blind out of their error. Thou canst make none to hear, save those who believe Our revelations and who have surrendered
t.arberry: Thou shalt not guide the blind out of their error neither shalt thou make any to hear, save such as believe in Our signs, and so surrender
t.hilali-khan: Nor can you lead the blind out of their error, you can only make to hear those who believe in Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.), and who have submitted (themselves to Allah in Islam as Muslims)
